title: Lavender Star
description: This is my Lavender Star pack, mainly made for Crystal PvP but it can also be used for sword PvP
body:
This is my Lavender Star pack, mainly made for Crystal PvP, but it can also be used for Sword PvP. It features a clean and smooth lavender style with simple textures that keep the game looking minimal while still feeling great during fights.

Join the Discord for more packs like this and future releases!!
